rationale: No corpus data at all for early-stage (entire tier is null in the extraction file). New search found only blended, non-level-specific aggregator data (Wellfound: 'Embedded Engineer in Software Startups' averages ~$150K for 7-10 YOE; 'AI Startups' ~$150K) with no seed/Series A-B named-company per-level breakdown available (Wellfound's detailed page returned 403/access-blocked on fetch). This is a genuinely hard-to-source segment — seed/Series A-B startups rarely disclose structured comp bands publicly, and levels.fyi has too few submissions for a reliable per-level median at this stage. Keeping low is the honest outcome.
